'''Antemeridias''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Antemeridian sector/Legends|Antemeridian sector]]. Located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was located along the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].

==History==
Under the control of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tol Getelles]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the world was home to a facility owned by [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]] where they produced [[Centrally Controlled Independent Replicant|CCIR needle fighters]]. Contacted by [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]] in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Getelles was offered a way to conquer the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]]. The Loronar Corporation supplied dissidents on [[Meridian]] with weapons, and Ashgad planned to release the [[Death Seed]] Plague across; the plot was foiled by the intervention of republic personnel [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].<ref name="Planet of Twilight">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref> Halting the plague and killing Ashgad, the Republic seized the planet under the leadership of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] and his two fleets.
